front: What is the identity for the gradient of a sum of two functions, ∇(f + g)?
What is the product rule for the gradient of a scalar function multiplied by a vector function, ∇(f 𝐀)?
State the identity for the gradient of a dot product, ∇(𝐀 · 𝐁).
What is the identity for the curl of the gradient of any scalar field, ∇⨯(∇φ)?
back: ∇⨯(∇φ) = 𝟎 (The curl of a gradient is always the zero vector.)

front: What is the identity for the divergence of the curl of any vector field, ∇·(∇⨯𝐀)?
back: ∇·(∇⨯𝐀) = 0 (The divergence of a curl is always zero.)
